rows.label: qev085406_MSG0001
rows.name: I'm glad Aisha came back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's all thanks to everyone.
Thank you so much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0003
rows.name: You'll have to make sure she can't escape again, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0004
rows.name: No, I can't do that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0005
rows.name: [ST:undisp]Hm?

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0006
rows.name:
Just as we have our missions,
Aisha has hers too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0007
rows.name:
The crucial mission of running around
the land of Mira—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0008
rows.name:
I see.
That's how she gathers data for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0009
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0010
rows.name:
It would be a problem if I couldn't recover the data,
but other than that, she's free to do as she pleases.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0011
rows.name:
Don't lie. If it was just about gathering data,
Frontier Net would be enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0012
rows.name: Even though you were actually worried sick about her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0013
rows.name: S-senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0014
rows.name: Aaah~ She's gone mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0015
rows.name: Go run around with all your energy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0016
rows.name: She looks like she feels so free.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0017
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0018
rows.name:
Someday, we too would like to run across the lands
of this planet in our own bodies, not [System:Ruby rt=Blue Bloods ]B.B.s[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev085406_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod strongly with a smile.

rows.label: qev085406_JNK0020
rows.name: Timid

rows.label: qev085406_SEL0021
rows.name: Express anxiety over whether that day will come.

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0019
rows.name:
If that were to happen,
I might end up surprising you all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0020
rows.name: Why is that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0021
rows.name: You will understand eventually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0022
rows.name:
What are you saying?!
We are going to bring that day about with our own hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085406_MSG0023
rows.name:
Lin is right.
Let us do our best until that day comes.[ST:wait ]
